## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Test update

## Checks

- [ ] I ran `npm test`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`.
- [ ] I updated docs if needed.
- [ ] I checked the UI in a narrow/mobile viewport if the UI changed.

## Notes

Add screenshots, known limitations, or follow-up tasks here.
